Article.ArticleTitle: Acute weight cycling and hydration status in elite kickboxers: a repeated-measures field study.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Coaching Education, Faculty of Sport Sciences, Kastamonu University, Kastamonu, 37150, Türkiye. bceylan@kastamonu.edu.tr.
Department of Coaching Education, Faculty of Sport Sciences, Kastamonu University, Kastamonu, 37150, Türkiye.
Department of Physical Education and Sport, Mehmet Arabacı School of Physical Education and Sport, Harran University, Şanlıurfa, Türkiye.
Department of Coaching Education, Faculty of Sport Sciences, Gazi University, Ankara, Türkiye.
Department of Recreation, Faculty of Sport Sciences, Eskişehir Technical University, Eskişehir, Türkiye.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval and consent to participate: Ethical approval was obtained from the Kastamonu University Non-Interventional Clinical Trials Ethical Committee (2025-47) and written informed consent was obtained from each participant before the commencement of the study. Consent for publication: Not applicable. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.

Reference.Citation: Barley OR, Chapman DW, Abbiss CR. The current state of weight-cutting in combat sports. Sports. 2019;7(5):123.
